title: Add syllabus tracker with chapters and study timer functionality

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for chapters with fields: chapter name (text), status (enum: Pending or Completed), and accumulated study time in minutes (nat). Chapters must be stored persistently and never auto-delete.

quotes: Each chapter has: - Chapter name - Status (Pending / Completed)
All data should be saved permanently

acceptanceCriteria: Chapter data structure includes name, status, and study time fields
Status field supports only 'Pending' and 'Completed' values
Chapters persist across canister upgrades
No automatic deletion logic exists for chapters

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to add new chapters with user access control, ensuring each user can only create and access their own chapters.
acceptanceCriteria: API method exists to create a new chapter with name and default Pending status
Method validates user authentication before creating chapter
Created chapters are associated with the authenticated user's profile
Users cannot access or create chapters for other users

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to update chapter status between Pending and Completed, with user access control.
acceptanceCriteria: API method exists to toggle or set chapter status
Method validates user owns the chapter before updating
Status changes persist to stable storage

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to track and accumulate study time for individual chapters, storing time in minutes.

quotes: Track time separately for each subject/chapter

acceptanceCriteria: API method exists to add study time to a specific chapter
Study time is stored as minutes and accumulated correctly
Method validates user ownership before updating chapter time
Total study time on dashboard reflects sum of all chapter times

requirements.text: Create a frontend page for the syllabus tracker that displays all user chapters in a list, showing chapter name, status badge, and individual study time for each chapter.

quotes: Syllabus Tracker: User can manually add chapters
Each chapter has: - Chapter name - Status (Pending / Completed)

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays a list of all user chapters
Each chapter shows name, status badge (Pending or Completed), and study time
Status uses color coding consistent with existing theme (sage for completed, terracotta for pending)
Empty state message shown when user has no chapters

requirements.text: Add a form on the syllabus tracker page to manually create new chapters with a name input field and submit button.
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes text input for chapter name
Submit button creates new chapter with Pending status
Form validates name is not empty before submission
Chapter list updates immediately after successful creation
Form clears after successful submission

requirements.text: Add status toggle functionality on each chapter item to switch between Pending and Completed states.
acceptanceCriteria: Each chapter has a clickable status badge or toggle control
Clicking toggles status between Pending and Completed
UI updates immediately to reflect new status
Status change persists to backend

requirements.text: Create a study timer component with Start and Stop buttons that tracks elapsed time in real-time and displays it in minutes and seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: Timer displays elapsed time in MM:SS format
Start button begins timer and changes to Stop button
Stop button pauses timer and resets button to Start
Timer continues counting while active
Timer resets when stopped

requirements.text: Add chapter selection to the study timer so users can associate timed study sessions with specific chapters, and save accumulated time to the selected chapter when timer stops.

quotes: Track time separately for each subject/chapter

acceptanceCriteria: Timer component includes dropdown or selector to choose a chapter
Timer cannot start without selecting a chapter
When timer stops, elapsed time is added to selected chapter's study time
Chapter's study time updates in backend and reflects in UI
Timer resets after saving time to chapter

requirements.text: Implement daily study goal setting functionality in the study timer, allowing users to set a target number of minutes for daily study.
acceptanceCriteria: Input field exists to set daily study goal in minutes
Daily goal persists in user profile
Study timer shows progress toward daily goal
Visual indicator shows when daily goal is reached

requirements.text: Update the dashboard progress calculation to use actual chapter data: calculate percentage as (completed chapters / total chapters) × 100.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard progress percentage reflects real chapter completion data
Progress is 0% when no chapters exist
Progress is 100% when all chapters are completed
Progress updates immediately when chapter status changes

requirements.text: Update the dashboard chapter statistics to display actual counts from user's chapters: total chapters, completed count, and pending count.
acceptanceCriteria: ChapterStatsCard displays real completed chapter count
ChapterStatsCard displays real pending chapter count
Total chapter count equals completed + pending
Counts update immediately when chapters are added or status changes

requirements.text: Update the dashboard study time display to show the sum of all chapter study times from the user's actual chapter data.
acceptanceCriteria: StudyTimeCard displays total minutes accumulated across all chapters
Time is formatted using existing timeFormatters utility
Study time updates when timer adds time to any chapter
Study time is 0 when user has no chapters or no recorded time

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
Preserve existing warm earth tone design theme (terracotta, sage green, cream)
Use React Query for all data fetching and mutations
Format time displays using existing timeFormatters utility
nonGoals: Notifications or reminders for study goals
